name: ModifyRefreshmentPoint
postconditions: The notification system has been changing the data point selected restaurants.
Restaurant Point Of Operator cancels the operation.
Interruption of the connection to the server ETOUR.

UC43: Enable the functionality of the information required by the point of rest.
Upload data point Refreshments and displays them in a form.
Change data in the form and submit.
Verify the data entered and asks for confirmation of the change. Where the data is invalid or insufficient, the system activates the use case Errored.
Stores the modified data of the point of rest.
